title: dendroglossa metallica
intro: Dendroglossa metallica, also known as the "Iron Tongue Plant", is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae, native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dendroglossa metallica include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and soothing sore throats, making it a popular herbal remedy. Dendroglossa metallica can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, or as a syrup by boiling the leaves in water and then adding sugar and water to create a soothing cough syrup.
